base_absorber.name: Nd0.15-BaM
base_absorber.description: Rare earth Nd-doped M-type barium ferrite (BaNd0.15Fe11.85O19). Prepared via sol-gel self-propagating combustion and sintered at 850C. Provides magnetic loss via natural resonance, exchange resonance, and eddy current effects.

CNTs.description: Multi-walled carbon nanotubes (MWCNTs), diameter 3-15nm, length 15-30um. Form conductive networks on Nd-BaM surface, providing strong resistive loss and electronic polarization. Sheet resistivity ~1.32 Ohm/sq.
CNTs.notes: Parameters fitted from VNA data (Feng et al., J Mater Sci Mater Eng 2024). CNTs exhibit highest conductivity among the three NC types, leading to strongest dielectric loss. eps increases approximately linearly with content up to ~8%.

GO.description: Graphene oxide, flake diameter 10-50um. Rich in oxygen-containing functional groups (-OH, -COOH, epoxy). Provides polarization loss via dipole relaxation. Sheet resistivity ~1.55e9 Ohm/sq.
GO.notes: GO has highest resistivity but rich functional groups generate polarization under EM field. EAB typically at low frequencies (<10 GHz), complementing BaM high-frequency absorption.

OLC.description: Onion-like carbon, spherical 5-10nm diameter, obtained by heat treatment of detonation nanodiamond at 1700C. Partial graphitization provides moderate conductivity. Sheet resistivity ~9.67 Ohm/sq.
OLC.notes: OLC as independent nanospheres may not form complete conductive network, limiting propagation path of incident EM waves. Moderate improvement compared to CNTs and GO.

_notes.data_source: Electromagnetic parameters approximated from VNA measurements (2-18 GHz) in Feng et al., J Mater Sci Mater Eng 2024, 19:49. Effective composite permittivity modeled as: eps_eff = eps_base + slope * carbon_content.
_notes.mixing_model: Simplified parametric model: effective permittivity of the composite depends on carbon type and content. Permeability primarily from Nd-BaM with small offsets from carbon addition.
_notes.sign_convention: eps_r = eps_real - j*eps_imag (negative imaginary part). Same for permeability.
_notes.key_finding: CNTs at 8% content achieved RL_min = -123.12 dB at 7.97 GHz with EAB = 5.46 GHz at 2.5mm thickness.
